text: Title: Ethan Mollick on X: "I have been playing these world models/games since the first diffusion DOOM, and multiplayer at 20 FPS is pretty neat. "A dream of rocket league," indeed." / X URL Source: https://x.com/emollick/status/2074348274136346871 Markdown Content: [](https://x.com/) ## Post [Log in](https://x.com/i/jf/onboarding/web?mode=login)[Sign up](https://x.com/i/jf/onboarding/web?mode=signup) ## Post [![Image 1: user avatar](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1601382188712398850/3AAOlqrX_normal.jpg)](https://x.com/emollick) [Ethan Mollick](https://x.com/emollick) [@emollick](https://x.com/emollick) I have been playing these world models/games since the first diffusion DOOM, and multiplayer at 20 FPS is pretty neat. "A dream of rocket league," indeed. [![Image 2: user avatar](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1973785237197901824/cm32ETTP_normal.jpg)](https://x.com/gen_intuition) [General Intuition](https://x.com/gen_intuition) [@gen_intuition](https://x.com/gen_intuition) [Jul 6](https://x.com/gen_intuition/status/2074104524596457706) Introducing MIRA. A playable, multiplayer world model. A dream of Rocket League. Trained on 10k hours of data collected with publicly available bots, MIRA learns the dynamics of a four-player game.
